ddls:
CREATE TABLE "class_schedules" (
  "schedule_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each class schedule entry */,
  "week_day" INTEGER /* Day of the week (1 for Monday, 2 for Tuesday, etc.) */,
  "start_time" INTEGER /* Start time of the class in minutes from midnight */,
  "end_time" INTEGER /* End time of the class in minutes from midnight */,
  "class_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the class ID */,
  "schedule_status" TEXT /* Status of the schedule entry (e.g., active, canceled, pending) */,
  "last_modified_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last modified the schedule */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the schedule was last modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("schedule_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_class_schedules_class_id FOREIGN KEY ("class_id") REFERENCES classes ("class_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "classes" (
  "class_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each class */,
  "course_name" TEXT /* Name of the course */,
  "department_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the department ID */,
  "semester_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the semester ID */,
  "instructor_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the instructor ID */,
  "room_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the room ID */,
  "class_type" TEXT /* Type of class (e.g., lecture, lab, seminar) */,
  "credit_hours" INTEGER /* Number of credit hours for the class */,
  "prerequisites" TEXT /* Comma-separated list of prerequisite classes */,
  "max_students" INTEGER /* Maximum number of students allowed in the class */,
  "current_students" INTEGER /* Current number of enrolled students */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("class_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_classes_semester_id FOREIGN KEY ("semester_id") REFERENCES semesters ("semester_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_classes_room_id FOREIGN KEY ("room_id") REFERENCES rooms ("room_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_classes_instructor_id FOREIGN KEY ("instructor_id") REFERENCES instructors ("instructor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_classes_department_id FOREIGN KEY ("department_id") REFERENCES departments ("department_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "departments" (
  "department_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each department */,
  "department_name" TEXT /* Name of the department */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the department */,
  "department_head_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the head of the department */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number for the department */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("department_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_departments_department_head_id FOREIGN KEY ("department_head_id") REFERENCES instructors ("instructor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "semesters" (
  "semester_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each semester */,
  "semester_name" TEXT /* Name of the semester (e.g., Fall 2023) */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the semester */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the semester */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the semester (e.g., active, closed) */,
  "registration_start" TEXT /* Start date for student registration */,
  "registration_end" TEXT /* End date for student registration */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("semester_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "instructors" (
  "instructor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each instructor */,
  "instructor_name" TEXT /* Full name of the instructor */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the instructor */,
  "department_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the department ID */,
  "office_location" TEXT /* Office location of the instructor */,
  "office_hours" TEXT /* Office hours of the instructor */,
  "availability_status" TEXT /* Availability status of the instructor (e.g., available, on leave) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("instructor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_instructors_department_id FOREIGN KEY ("department_id") REFERENCES departments ("department_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "rooms" (
  "room_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each room */,
  "room_number" TEXT /* Room number */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Capacity of the room */,
  "building_name" TEXT /* Name of the building where the room is located */,
  "campus" TEXT /* Campus where the room is located */,
  "equipment" TEXT /* List of equipment available in the room */,
  "availability_status" TEXT /* Availability status of the room (e.g., available, under maintenance) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("room_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, department head, instructor) */,
  "department_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the department ID */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password of the user */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* Date and time of the last login */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the user account was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_department_id FOREIGN KEY ("department_id") REFERENCES departments ("department_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the system */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the system was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit, delete) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the system */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used to access the system */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "conflicts" (
  "conflict_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each conflict */,
  "class_id" INTEGER /* ID of the class involved in the conflict */,
  "conflict_type" TEXT /* Type of conflict (e.g., time, room, instructor) */,
  "conflict_description" TEXT /* Description of the conflict */,
  "detected_date" TEXT /* Date when the conflict was detected */,
  "resolved_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who resolved the conflict */,
  "resolution_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the conflict was resolved */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("conflict_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_conflicts_class_id FOREIGN KEY ("class_id") REFERENCES classes ("class_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_conflicts_resolved_by FOREIGN KEY ("resolved_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
